{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sandviper chief
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The current [[Sandviper chief]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
